title: Add 19 crystal products to shop section and fix QR code in payment

requirements.summary: Add 38 crystal product entries (19 crystals × 2 forms) to static products data with generated images
acceptanceCriteria: All 19 crystals appear in the ProductCatalog section as separate raw and bracelet product cards (38 total cards)
Each product card shows the crystal name, type badge (raw/bracelet), metaphysical property description, and price starting from ₹600
Filtering by 'crystal' tab shows all raw forms; filtering by 'bracelet' tab shows all bracelet forms
Product images render without broken-image errors

file_operations.description: Add 38 new product entries (19 crystals in both raw and bracelet forms) to the products array. Each raw crystal must have: id format '<crystal-name>-raw', name '<Crystal Name> (Raw)', description mentioning the metaphysical property from the BuildRequest (e.g., 'The Master Healer for Clear Quartz'), productType 'crystal', price 600 (base price before markup per constraints), isTrending false, and imageUrl pointing to 'frontend/public/assets/generated/<crystal-name>-raw.dim_800x800.png'. Each bracelet must have: id format '<crystal-name>-bracelet', name '<Crystal Name> Bracelet', same metaphysical property description, productType 'bracelet', price 800 (base price before markup per constraints), isTrending false, and imageUrl pointing to 'frontend/public/assets/generated/<crystal-name>-bracelet.dim_800x800.png'. All 19 crystals from the BuildRequest must be included: Clear Quartz, Amethyst, Rose Quartz, Black Tourmaline, Green Aventurine, Labradorite, Selenite, Fluorite, Aquamarine, Malachite, Black Obsidian, Carnelian, Moonstone, Lapis Lazuli, Pyrite, Tiger's Eye, Moldavite, Blue Lace Agate, Garden Quartz. Use the exact generated image filenames from imageRequirements (e.g., clear-quartz-raw.dim_800x800.png, amethyst-bracelet.dim_800x800.png). Do not modify existing product entries.

requirements.summary: Replace broken QR code image in payment section with correct generated QR code
acceptanceCriteria: The QR code image renders without error in the payment step of the appointment booking flow
The displayed QR code matches the uploaded image (shows Ishita Singh, UPI ID 9305831180@pthdfc)
No broken image icon appears in the payment section

file_operations.description: Update the QR code image src in the payment step to reference the correct generated QR code at 'frontend/public/assets/generated/qr-code.dim_600x800.png'. Locate the img element displaying the QR code within the payment confirmation UI (likely inside a conditional render for currentStep === 'payment' or similar) and replace its src attribute value with '/assets/generated/qr-code.dim_600x800.png'. Ensure the alt text remains descriptive (e.g., 'UPI Payment QR Code'). Do not modify any other payment logic, form validation, or appointment submission flow.
